songs.title: Ocean Avenue
feed: “Ocean Avenue” by Yellowcard reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.

“Ocean Avenue” by Yellowcard is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 205 streams units.
“Ocean Avenue” by Yellowcard is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
“Ocean Avenue” by Yellowcard is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 375,641 total units.
